video_info.title: UFC 326 - Holloway vs Oliveira 2
video_info.shortDescription: Max Holloway defends his BMF title against Charles Oliveira in the UFC 326 main event. This lightweight rematch, over a decade after their 2015 clash, pits Holloway's striking volume against Oliveira's grappling prowess. Tune in to catch all the action from UFC 326, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
video_info.longDescription: Max Holloway defends his BMF title against Charles Oliveira in the UFC 326 main event. Tune in to catch all the action from UFC 326, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
